problem id: 4ef88f92
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  01101101 -> 10010111
  01000001 -> 01111101
  11001110 -> 01011110
  10011110 -> 10111011
  01111010 -> 11100111
  01110101 -> 11000111
  00110100 -> 01000111
  01101100 -> 10010111
  10010101 -> 10001001
  11011000 -> 00101111

query: 00110011
predicted answer: 01010111
